title: Get proof of Canadian citizenship - Canada.ca
content:
## Get proof of Canadian citizenship
What you need to prove your Canadian citizenship, how to apply and how to search existing Canadian citizenship records.
On December 15, 2025, the Government of Canada passed Bill C-3 to change the first-generation limit on citizenship by descent.
The Ontario Superior Court of Justice ruled in December 2023 that the limit was unconstitutional for many people. In March 2025, we introduced an interim measure to support those affected.
We will now process all applications submitted under the interim measure using the new rules.
Learn more about this change .
- Check your application status
- Check processing times
- Get answers to your questions about citizenship

## Services and information

### Check if you’re a Canadian citizen
Find out if you’re already a Canadian citizen

### Apply for, replace or update a Canadian citizenship certificate
How to apply, forms, fees and processing times

### Documents that prove your Canadian citizenship
Canadian citizenship certificate, citizenship card and commemorative certificate, and other acceptable documents

### Search existing Canadian citizenship records
How to apply, forms and fees
